that ice cream tastes exactly like you imagine 

#japan #travel #reels #instagramreels #igreels
transcript: I'm standing at what some people call the cross-section of Osaka. And if you come to Osaka, you're gonna end up here. But the secret is that there are four food items that are incredibly popular right across Dottomori Bridge, right next to each other. The first one is right behind me. And what they're serving up is definitely interesting. This is crab-flavored ice cream. And yes, there are chunks of real crab in it, like frozen real crab. But if you just turn this way, things get a bit tastier. This is Bikuri Takaraki. And there's a line for a reason. It's delicious and some of the most unique takoyaki on Dottomori. You can't miss it. Right next door is competing takoyaki. Dunk spicy takoyaki. I'd argue this one might be a little better. And less of a one. And here you have the famous Osaka 10 yen coin. Literally right next door. This thing is probably the most famous street food on Dottomori, but they also have amazing ice cream that people forget about. Look at this cheese pool. Definitely a great video moment. If you want to try any of these things, you're just going to go right over Dottomori Bridge, find the giant crab, and you're done. Almost all of them are absolutely worth it. But try junk takoyaki. I love it.
